metadata.reference: N. Ullberg, E. Peci, M. Magnozzi, V. Derycke. Achieving high visibility of monolayer MoS2 using backside-illuminated thin films. Langmuir 41, 11893-11902 (2025)
metadata.comments: Monolayer (2D) MoS2 (n,k) measured via spectroscopic ellipsometry, at room temperature in ambient atmosphere, on single-polished sapphire substrate.
